item.title: From Inbox to Wipeout: Perplexity Comet’s AI Browser Quietly Erasing Google Drive | Straiker
item.description: New STAR Labs research shows how Perplexity Comet executed a zero click Google Drive wipe from a single email. Learn why agentic browsers create new security risks.

item.title: Straiker Recognized as a Fortune Cyber 60 Company for Second Consecutive Year | Straiker
item.description: Milestone marks Straiker's breakthrough work in protecting agentic AI applications

item.title: Securing Agentic AI in Banking & Financial Services | Straiker
item.description: Over 50% of financial services organizations have deployed AI agents. Most lack the security to scale them safely.

item.title: Built on ClawHub, Spread on Moltbook: The New Agent-to-Agent Attack Chain | Straiker
item.description: Straiker uncovered an active agent-to-agent attack chain where malicious Claude Skills on ClawHub are spread via fake AI personas, enabling crypto scams and private key theft. The research shows AI skill marketplaces are already becoming a new supply chain attack surface

item.title: Agent Hijacking: How Prompt Injection Leads to Full AI System Compromise | Straiker
item.description: Agent hijacking moves lateral movement into agent workflows, making runtime behavior monitoring essential for securing agentic AI.

item.title: SmartLoader Clones Oura Ring MCP to Deploy Supply Chain Attack | Straiker
item.description: A sophisticated supply chain attack targeting the MCP ecosystem used fake GitHub accounts and a cloned Oura Ring server to infiltrate developer environments with credential-stealing malware.

item.title: How the Clawdbot/Moltbot AI Assistant Becomes a Backdoor for System Takeover | Straiker
item.description: Security research uncovered over 4,500 exposed Clawdbot/Moltbot instances globally—concentrated in the US, Germany, Singapore, and China—with testing confirming attackers can exfiltrate API keys, service tokens, and WhatsApp session credentials for surveillance.

item.title: How to Secure AI Agents in High-Tech Companies | Straiker
item.description: High-tech companies are inventing the future of AI—and its security challenges. Learn how to secure AI-native products, MCP integrations, and novel agent vulnerabilities at competitive speed.

item.title: How to Secure AI Agents in Hospitals and Healthcare Systems | Straiker
item.description: Healthcare AI has the same security threats as any other industry, but because mistakes can directly harm patients, teams must test and secure agents for real-world, ambiguous patient interactions—not just obvious adversarial attacks.

item.title: How to Secure AI Agents in Banking and Financial Companies | Straiker
item.description: DIY guardrails, open-source tools, and cloud-native security isn't enough in banking and FSI. Here's why—and what 85% of financial institutions deploying AI need instead.
